user.title: Select Energy Sensors
user.description: Select the energy sensors from your inverter integration. Total Import and Total Export are required.

prices.title: Prices & Compensation Ratio
prices.description: Configure your electricity prices and the compensation ratio from your energy provider.

data.raport_compensare: Compensation ratio (e.g. 2.5 = export 2.5 kWh to get 1 kWh free)

error.missing_required: Total Import and Total Export sensors are required.
error.entity_not_found: Entity not found. Please check the entity ID.

init.title: Prosumer Compensare Settings
init.description: What would you like to configure?

sensors.title: Edit Energy Sensors
sensors.description: Change which sensors are used for tracking. Total Import and Total Export are required.

prices.title: Edit Prices & Ratio
prices.description: Update your electricity prices and compensation ratio.
